description: Style NoteTake on those intimidating trails with this capable pair from nike. The Air Alvord 10 comes with a mesh upper for enhanced breathability and light weightiness. The cushion effect on the heel is great, especially since there's an air unit at the heel.Product DetailsMesh upper with strategically placed overlaysPadded tongue and collar with fabric lining and a pull loop at the heel collarHas a cushioned insole with mesh padding insideThick rubber midsole with an air unit at the heelMultidirectional lugs on the TPU outsole which also has a decoupled heel and an impact guidance lineMaterial and CareSynthetic, mesh, leatherClean with a leather brushDo not store under sunlight or wash
